taxonomy: Ixora pueuana is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to the Mascarene Islands, specifically Réunion and Mauritius. The classification of Ixora pueuana places it within the genus Ixora, a group of flowering plants commonly known as jungle geraniums. The genus Ixora is further classified under the subfamily Ixoroideae and the order Gentianales. Its classification is based on its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Rubiaceae family.
